quest.main.cure.basic.desc_1: The facts are simple: Despite society's rapid collapse, a §bcure§r had been made and was being distributed.
quest.main.cure.basic.desc_2: Of course, that doesn't mean you can make more right now, but it wouldn't hurt to have a good stockpile in case of the worst.
quest.main.cure.basic.desc_3: At the moment, your best shot of getting your hands on a large quantity would be by looting §bmedical facilities§r.
quest.main.cure.basic.subtitle: Know Thy Enemy
quest.main.cure.basic.title: Understanding the Basics
quest.main.cure.catalog.desc_1: Collecting the papers only further reinforces your suspicions — a cure was made, but it was incomplete, only treating the symptons and doing nothing to prevent re-infection.
quest.main.cure.catalog.desc_2: Nonetheless, it can be re-made with the help of a reagent called the §bX Factor§r, which the papers say contains materials that do not originate from this dimension.
quest.main.cure.catalog.desc_3: While the stock of that reagent seems to be limited, there should be enough to make as many apples as you desire — assuming you can find it.
quest.main.cure.catalog.subtitle: A Brief History of the Cure
quest.main.cure.catalog.title: The Catalog
quest.main.cure.cure.desc_1: Combine Formula X with an ordinary apple to make a golden apple.
quest.main.cure.cure.desc_2: If you’ve successfully automated things up to this point, congratulations — humanity has regained its ability to make a cure for the infection!
quest.main.cure.cure.desc_3: However… without access to the dimension the reagent originates from, the timer has merely been delayed.
quest.main.cure.cure.desc_4: §oPerhaps... perhaps we need to go deeper.§r
quest.main.cure.cure.subtitle: The Scenic Route
quest.main.cure.cure.title: The Cure
quest.main.cure.find_wasteland.desc_1: The source of the apocalypse, the Wasteland is all that remains after both being overrun by infected and the catastrophic meltdown of its many nuclear reactors.
quest.main.cure.find_wasteland.desc_2: Find the laboratory at the heart of it all, and uncover its secrets...
quest.main.cure.find_wasteland.title: The Wasteland
quest.main.cure.gasmask.desc_1: Rumors say that the outbreak came from another world, the portal to which is hidden in a lab deep in what is now a radioactive wasteland… but a long journey lies ahead.
quest.main.cure.gasmask.desc_2: Craft or trade for a gas mask, or find hazmat suits in hospitals — but beware, as they will only last so long.
quest.main.cure.gasmask.desc_3: It’s recommended to bring extra filters for your mask, as you can right-click them while wearing it to repair.
quest.main.cure.gasmask.subtitle: The Long Journey
quest.main.cure.gasmask.title: Seeking the Source
quest.main.cure.info_casino.desc_1: Rumors suggest a key piece of the cure research is up for for sale at the §bCasino§r, every gambler’s favorite place.
quest.main.cure.info_casino.desc_2: Take it for yourself, or find someone who knows where it is.
quest.main.cure.info_casino.title: Gather Research - §aHighrise Hotel District§r
quest.main.cure.info_courtyard.desc_1: The §bCourtyard Office§r towers above even the skyscrapers of the highrise office district.
quest.main.cure.info_courtyard.desc_2: Intel suggests a high-ranking office worker staying there has come into possession of research on the cure.
quest.main.cure.info_courtyard.title: Gather Research - §aHighrise Office District§r
quest.main.cure.info_lab.desc_1: Visit the §bC-07 Laboratory§r and uncover the secrets behind the outbreak. Rumors claim that one of the key ingredients for the cure was produced here.
quest.main.cure.info_lab.desc_2: If there is any research on the cure at all, it will definitely be found in there.
quest.main.cure.info_lab.title: Gather Research - §aWasteland§r
quest.main.cure.info_plaza.desc_1: There are rumors that some scientists managed to take refuge in the §bTerrace Plaza Mall§r, one of the largest malls in the city.
quest.main.cure.info_plaza.desc_2: You may be able to get information on the cure from them... or loot it from where they died.
quest.main.cure.info_plaza.title: Gather Research - §aRetail District§r
quest.main.cure.info_school.desc_1: A group of students claim to have rediscovered the method for recreating the cure, but contact with them was lost soon after.
quest.main.cure.info_school.desc_2: If what they say is true, the research papers should be in the §bVertical School§r.
quest.main.cure.info_school.title: Gather Research - §aHighrise Residential District§r
quest.main.cure.precursor.desc_1: With both the research book and the X Factor, you are finally ready to take on the challenge of manufacturing the cure.
quest.main.cure.precursor.desc_2: Automate it if you wish, or just make one trial run — the choice is yours.
quest.main.cure.precursor.subtitle: Not Quite Chemical X
quest.main.cure.precursor.title: The Precursor
quest.main.cure.x_factor.desc_1: After the cure was created, many laboratories banded together in hopes of finding a way to speed up the painfully slow production process — or subsitute the alien materials used entirely.
quest.main.cure.x_factor.desc_2: Though their efforts came too late to save themselves, it seems their work was not in vain.
quest.main.cure.x_factor.desc_3: While the method of making more of this reagent is now locked behind a deactivated portal, there should be enough of it left here to finish the cure — if you have the proper knowledge.
quest.main.cure.x_factor.subtitle: *buzzer noise*
quest.main.cure.x_factor.title: The X Factor
quest.main.district.highrise_hotel.desc_: &o&7An entertainment district dominated by hotels and club venues, crowned by a megatall casino.&r
&o&7Craft a &bBuilding Catalog&r &o&7to register buildings into this questbook!&r
&cHeat&r protection recommended: &bRare Cooling Coat&r or better!
&o&7For more information, check the Temperature chapter!&r
&o&7Use a &bNature's Compass&r &o&7to locate this district in the following biomes:&r
quest.main.district.highrise_hotel.title: Highrise Hotel District
quest.main.district.highrise_office.desc: &o&7A crowded district full of medium to highrise offices.&r
&o&7Craft a &bBuilding Catalog&r &o&7to register buildings into this questbook!&r
&cHeat&r protection recommended: &bCommon Cooling Coat&r or better!
&o&7For more information, check the Temperature chapter!&r
&o&7Use a &bNature's Compass&r &o&7to locate this district in the following biomes:&r
quest.main.district.highrise_residential: &o&7A district full of highrise residential buildings, damaged during the panic of the inital infection.&r
&o&7Craft a &bBuilding Catalog&r &o&7to register buildings into this questbook!&r
&bCold&r protection recommended: &cCommon Warming Coat&r or better!
&o&7For more information, check the Temperature chapter!&r
&o&7Use a &bNature's Compass&r &o&7to locate this district in the following biomes:&r
quest.main.district.radar.desc_1: &7Not sure what building you're at? Want to find a specific building?
quest.main.district.radar.desc_2: Craft or find a &bBuilding Radar&r§r and charge it. You can charge it by crafting it with a &bBattery&r, or a charging station.
quest.main.district.radar.desc_3: You can loot various &bflyers&r which will allow you to search for specific buildings.
quest.main.district.radar.desc_4: &cWARNING:&r Be aware that searching for buildings may cause lag as new chunks are generated!
quest.main.district.radar.desc_5: &7Information on where to find &bflyers &7can be found by looking at the building loot tables in their respective &6District Chapter&r.
quest.main.district.radar.subtitle: DeceasedCraft's most awaited feature...
quest.main.district.radar.title: Building Radar
quest.main.district.retail.desc_1: &o&7A sprawling retail district, the largest of which is the Terrace Plaza Mall.&r
quest.main.district.retail.desc_17: &o&7Craft a &bBuilding Catalog&r &o&7to register buildings into this questbook!&r
quest.main.district.retail.desc_4: &bCold&r protection recommended: &cRare Warming Coat&r or better!
quest.main.district.retail.desc_5: &o&7For more information, check the Temperature chapter!&r
quest.main.district.retail.desc_7: &o&7Use a &bNature's Compass&r &o&7to locate this district in the following biomes:&r
quest.main.district.retail.subtitle: Commerce Capital
quest.main.district.retail.title: Retail District
quest.main.district.suburb_residential.d: &o&7A peaceful neighbourhood comprised of small suburban houses.&r
&o&7Use a &bNature's Compass&r &o&7to locate this district in the following biomes:&r
&o&7Craft a &bBuilding Catalog&r &o&7to register buildings into this questbook!&r
quest.main.district.survivor_radar.desc_: &bNPCs&r can be found with the &bSurvivor Radar&r§r, a lootable item found in the &eSuburban Residential District&r.
Completing their &bquests&r will allow you to &btrade&r with them, allowing for a renewable source of some important resources.
Active quests§e§r can be tracked using §6[F8]§r.
§cNOTE:§r The Survivor Radar only shows NPCs in §cgenerated chunks§r - you may have to explore more if no signals are found!
&7For more information on where NPCs can be found, consult the respective &6District Chapter&r.
quest.main.district.survivor_radar.title: Locating Survivors
quest.main.district.wasteland.desc_1: &o&7Dotted with factories and housing the massive C-07 laboratory, a ruined nuclear reactor has rendered this district hospitable only to the dead.&r
quest.main.district.wasteland.desc_5: &o&7For more information, check the Radiation chapter!&r
quest.main.district.wasteland.desc_7: &o&7Use a &bNature's Compass&r &o&7to locate this district in the following biomes:&r
quest.main.district.wasteland.subtitle: Ghosts of Industry
quest.main.district.wasteland.title: The Wasteland
